name: Watchlist
description: Bookmark any movie or series from its detail page. Bookmarked items appear in a home-screen row and a dedicated Watchlist tab. Items auto-remove when marked as played.
overview: Per-user watchlist with home-screen row and library tab.

versions.changelog: Add IndexHtmlPatcher: IHostedService that directly patches index.html on disk at startup, bypassing ASP.NET pipeline ordering issues. Expand middleware path matching. Add debug logging.
Fix bookmark icon injection: switch BookmarkInjectionMiddleware to IMiddleware pattern (DI-resolved per request) and add direct-from-disk primary path. Script now served via /Watchlist/inject.js.
